title: torreyochloa pallida subsp. natans
intro: Torreyochloa pallida subsp. natans, also known as floating bent grass, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Torreyochloa pallida subsp. natans include reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using it in tincture form, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
